parent_history: Spun off from NXP Semiconductors RF Power division in 2015. NXP RF Power was previously part of Philips Semiconductors.

product_families.description: High-voltage (50V) LDMOS transistors for wideband applications: avionics pulse systems, industrial RF heating, ISM, medical. Covers 10 kHz to 500 MHz in push-pull configuration.
Generation 9 LDMOS for cellular infrastructure (LTE/5G). Covers 700 MHz – 3.8 GHz. Optimised for Doherty and wideband LDMOS PAs for macro BTS.
Compact form-factor Gen9 LDMOS purpose-built for 5G NR sub-6 GHz Massive MIMO / AAU applications. Single-ended and Doherty-ready pairs.

product_families.family_name: GaN — High Efficiency GaN on SiC
product_families.description: Gallium Nitride on Silicon Carbide for applications requiring higher frequency capability, higher power density, and wider bandwidth than LDMOS. Sub-6 GHz and mmWave products.

package_guide.MOS-10: Large 10-lead plastic overmoulded package (SOT1227A), used for push-pull broadband devices up to ~2 kW pulsed
package_guide.MOS-9: 9-lead variant, used for single-ended broadband devices
package_guide.LFPAK56: Surface-mount power package, used for cellular Gen9 LDMOS (single device)
package_guide.LFPAK56D: Dual-device LFPAK56 package — used for Doherty-paired (main+peak) devices
package_guide.SOT539: Air-cavity ceramic package, high-frequency capable, used for some GaN/LDMOS
package_guide.air-cavity: Hermetic air-cavity package for high reliability / military / space

notes: Data populated from training knowledge (2024). Verify exact specifications, part numbers and availability at https://www.ampleon.com/products.html. Download datasheets and drop into workspace/data/kb/ampleon/ to upgrade confidence level.
